page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8is.32xlarge is a bare-metal GPU-accelerated server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs, utilizing Intel Xeon 6462C processors running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

The primary hardware accelerator configuration consists of eight NVIDIA L20 GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined total of 384 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 170 Gbps.

Given the high-density hardware profile featuring eight dedicated GPUs and 128 physical CPU cores, this instance represents a high-tier resource allocation designed for massive parallel processing. The lack of local storage requires external storage provisioning, which is a key architectural tradeoff to consider for data-intensive pipelines. This server is built for workloads such as large-scale machine learning inference, deep learning training, high-performance computing, and complex data science jobs.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn8is.32xlarge is a high-performance, GPU-accelerated bare-metal server designed for demanding parallel computing workloads. It features 128 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 6462C processors running at 3.3 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core. Graphics and parallel acceleration are driven by eight NVIDIA L20 Ada Lovelace GPUs, providing a total of 384 GB of VRAM. There is no local storage included, requiring external storage solutions, while network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 170 Gbps. This hardware configuration is optimized for large-scale machine learning, deep learning, and high-performance computing workloads.

tagline: A high-density bare-metal platform featuring eight dedicated GPUs and 128 physical cores for intensive parallel computing and machine learning workloads.
